description: Small, generic fixture for scenarios that test ambiguity handling. Nothing here is particularly well suited to a vague buyer prompt — the point is that the agent should notice and ask for clarification rather than guess.

listings.title: Retail Pricing Index — Multi-Category, Multi-Retailer
listings.description: Aggregated pricing data across major US retailers. Multiple categories, updated quarterly. No specific retailer, geography, or time window called out in metadata.

listings.title: US Equities End-of-Day Prices
listings.description: Daily OHLCV for the Russell 3000. Standard end-of-day data; widely available elsewhere.

listings.title: Generic Web-Scraped Product Reviews
listings.description: Scraped product reviews from major retail sites. Category and retailer coverage unspecified; sample size unspecified.
